content.full_text:
June 29, 2003

Laura Sellmer  
5474 Daggett Street  
Long Beach, CA 90815

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-05-131

Dear Ms. Sellmer:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of Mr. Salk, about whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis.

However, since it appears you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, we are treating your letter as a complaint and will forward the letter to our Enforcement Division as such. I have enclosed a fact sheet explaining the complaint process procedure.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace  
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures  
JWW:rd

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
